title: D2.1: Action Research Protocol
author: Lenaerts, Lenaerts
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In order to ensure a synchronised data collection, this research protocol provides instructions on how to gather and analyse data from the activities performed when following the manual for case development. This involves recording workshops, gathering the responses from students and teachers and synthesising these in a streamlined fashion. Rigorous planning of these data collection activities is paramount for successfully going through the phases of initial planning, implementation, reflection and planning agai
steps_raw: In order to ensure a synchronised data collection, this research protocol provides instructions on how to gather and analyse data from the activities performed when following the manual for case development. This involves recording workshops, gathering the responses from students and teachers and synthesising these in a streamlined fashion. Rigorous planning of these data collection activities is paramount for successfully going through the phases of initial planning, implementation, reflection and planning agai
keywords: NextFood; h2020; action-research; cyclical learning; case development
